kafka tests

malformed length - not enough data
echo -n "00000023001200046f7fc66100096b61666b612d636c69000a6b61666b612d636c6904302e310" | xxd -r -p | nc localhost 9092 | hexdump -C

err none
echo -n "00000023001200046f7fc66100096b61666b612d636c69000a6b61666b612d636c6904302e3101" | xxd -r -p | nc localhost 9092 | hexdump -C

err none
echo -n
"0000002300120004157a25b900096b61666b612d636c69000a6b61666b612d636c6904302e3100" | xxd -r -p | nc localhost 9092 | hexdump -C

err unsupported
echo -n "00000023001200446f7fc66100096b61666b612d636c69000a6b61666b612d636c6904302e3100" | xxd -r -p | nc localhost 9092 | hexdump -C


describe multiple topics
echo -n "0000002d004b00004dc31e0a000c6b61666b612d746573746572000404706178000470617a000471757a0000000004ff00" | xxd -r -p | nc localhost 9092 | hexdump -C
